images_processed.headline: निरस्त हुआ बिजली कनेक्शन (Electricity Connection Cancelled)
images_processed.context: Sampurna Samadhan Divas (Complete Resolution Day) at block level in Bahraich/Shravasti district. 328 applications received, 31 disposed on spot. Officials directed to resolve pending cases. 127 applications at tehsil level, 8 disposed on spot. AAS women reached SDM Sanjay Kumar with demands.

images_processed.headline: गजभिन्यों को देहात संस्था ने बांटे पौधे व सब्जियों के बीज (DEHAT distributed plants and vegetable seeds to women farmers)
images_processed.context: DEHAT distributed 200 plants and seeds of spinach, brinjal, coriander, tomato, cucumber, chilli, and desi bhindi to women farmers in Sisay, Jamranwa, Bichhiya blocks. Ram-Narayan explained seeds will help women become self-reliant and improve family health through organic farming.

images_processed.headline: ई-केवाईसी के नाम पर खाते से निकाले दस हजार रुपये (₹10,000 withdrawn from account in name of e-KYC)
images_processed.context: News from Sujauli police station area about a woman who withdrew ₹10,000 from her husband's ICICI bank account without his knowledge. Related to women's financial rights advocacy and digital literacy training.
Government official visiting village and addressing a group of ~20 women farmers. Evidence of block-level interface meetings and advocacy work. Official reading from document to community members.

Woman farmer standing in her field with bamboo trellis/machan structures for growing climbing vegetables (tomatoes visible). Evidence of multi-layer farming and trellis farming techniques promoted by DEHAT under LEISA training.
Woman farmer working with machan/trellis cultivation structures in her field. Shows intercropping with onions and climbing vegetables. Evidence of sustainable agriculture practices.
Group of ~20 women farmers sitting in a circle with DEHAT staff, receiving onion plant seedlings from nursery. Evidence of input support and nursery distribution activities described in HY4 report.
Woman farmer preparing palak (spinach) seeds for sowing. Shows seed preservation and preparation techniques taught in LEISA training. Evidence of self-reliance in seed production.

key_achievements: Multiple RCC and kuccha roads constructed
Mobile network tower secured for tribal villages (2024)
School construction promised for Bhatta Bargadha
Inter College guarantee from MP for tribal village
PDS corruption addressed in Fakirpuri, Bardia, Hazaripurwa
Forest Department extortion stopped in Kailashnagar
Women's Gram Sabha participation increased from <10% to 50%+
40 farmers participated in Kisan Mela, 2 recognized by DM

stories_of_change.name: Sanjaywati
stories_of_change.key_outcome: Leased 18 bighas land, stopped migration, adopted natural farming

stories_of_change.name: Rajkumari
stories_of_change.key_outcome: ₹10,000 profit from 1/5 bigha onion, 6 quintal turmeric (highest in district), recognized at Kisan Mela

stories_of_change.name: Guddi Devi
stories_of_change.key_outcome: Won legal battle for land rights in father's name, adopted natural farming

stories_of_change.name: Bhakuri
stories_of_change.key_outcome: Dalit woman transformed from debt to self-reliance through organic farming

stories_of_change.name: Shanti Devi
stories_of_change.key_outcome: 600 cost → ₹24,500 income from brinjal, doubled family income

stories_of_change.name: Deventi Devi
stories_of_change.key_outcome: Stopped Forest Department grain collection, started kitchen garden

stories_of_change.name: Reena Kumari
stories_of_change.key_outcome: Child Parliament PM, fought police harassment, got SHO suspended

key_learnings: Seed preservation using bamboo containers with cow dung and neem
Wide field boundary construction for soil moisture retention
Community ownership of water, forest, and land resources
True Governance, True Farming, True Childhood model
